music.title: Music
music.profileText: Yorushika (ヨルシカ) is a Japanese duo formed in April 2017 by n-buna (composer / guitar) and suis (vocals), currently on Polydor Records (Universal Music Japan). They are known for literary lyrics and concept albums that weave music together with novels, art books and spoken-word tracks — and for never showing their faces in public. The name comes from a line in “Kumo to Yūrei”: “I can only sleep at night.”
